top_signals.title: The oil shock is coming for America
top_signals.summary: Tools that worked to lower prices in the last crisis have already been spent
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Grafana refuses to pay ransom after codebase theft
top_signals.summary: On Saturday night, the company released a statement confirming the incident and outlining their decision not to pay a ransom issued by the hackers behind the attack.
